description: Send an ephemeral message visible only to one user

param_descriptions.channel: Channel to post the ephemeral message in
param_descriptions.user: User ID who will see the ephemeral message
param_descriptions.blocks: JSON array of Block Kit blocks
param_descriptions.thread_ts: Thread timestamp for ephemeral in thread

name: chat.postMessage
description: Send a message to a channel

param_descriptions.channel: Channel, private group, or IM channel to send message to (ID)
param_descriptions.text: Text of the message (used as fallback for Block Kit)
param_descriptions.blocks: JSON array of Block Kit blocks
param_descriptions.thread_ts: Thread timestamp to reply in a thread
param_descriptions.reply_broadcast: Post thread reply to channel too (boolean)
param_descriptions.unfurl_links: Enable URL unfurling in the message
param_descriptions.unfurl_media: Enable media unfurling in the message
param_descriptions.metadata: JSON metadata attached to the message
param_descriptions.parse: Change how messages are treated (none, full)
param_descriptions.link_names: Find and link channel names and usernames
param_descriptions.attachments: JSON array of legacy attachment objects
param_descriptions.icon_emoji: Emoji to use as the icon for this message (bot only)
param_descriptions.icon_url: URL to image to use as icon for this message (bot only)

param_descriptions.channel: Channel to post the scheduled message to
param_descriptions.post_at: Unix timestamp for when to send the message
param_descriptions.blocks: JSON array of Block Kit blocks

description: Start a streaming response in a channel

param_descriptions.ts: Timestamp of the message to update
param_descriptions.blocks: New Block Kit blocks for the message
